POL.Name: neg_pe
POL.Comment: DEF: RECODE NEGATIVE INCOMES TO ZERO

POL.Name: tscer_pe
POL.Comment: SIC: Social Insurance Contributions of Employers Health

POL.Name: bsa_pe
POL.Comment: BEN: Social Assistance Conditional Cash Transfer (Juntos)

POL.Name: tscee_pe
POL.Comment: SIC: Social Insurance Contributions Employee Pension

POL.Name: tscse_pe
POL.Comment: SIC: Social Insurance Contributions Self-Employed Health

POL.Name: bot01_pe
POL.Comment: BEN: Stay at Home Bonus (Bono me quedo en casa)

POL.Name: xhhadj_pe
POL.Comment: DEF: Adjust consumption to new disposable income

FUN.Name: Uprate
FUN.Comment: Define uprating factors applied to monetary variables

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Standard disposable income (not accounting for own produce) (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Disposable income taking into account in-kind benefits

FUN.Name: DefTu
FUN.Comment: Define tax unit - OECD Household definition

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Set earnings at least at the level of minimum wage

FUN.Name: Elig
FUN.Comment: Those with positive registered employment earnings

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Recode negative employment income to zero

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Recode negative self-employment income to zero

FUN.Name: Elig
FUN.Comment: Conditional if contributes to Public Retirement PLan

FUN.Name: Elig
FUN.Comment: Conditional if contributes to Private Retirement PLan

FUN.Name: Elig
FUN.Comment: Identify those eligible to pay self-employed contributions

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Indirect taxes (“part of indirect taxes” in Statistics Presenter)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Social security contributions (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Child benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Social assistance benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Orphan/widows benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Disability benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Unemployment benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Agricultural benefits (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Post-fiscal income taking into account own produce

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Disposable income accounting for own produce

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Simulated consumption (feeds into Statistics Presenter, do not change)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Indirect subsidies (“Indirect subsidies” in Statistics Presenter)

FUN.Name: DefIl
FUN.Comment: Standard rated items for VAT purposes

FUN.Name: ArithOp
FUN.Comment: Nationally used equivalence scale: Per capita equivalence scale (number of household members)

FUN.Name: DefConst
FUN.Comment: Specify share of own-production consumed that is protected from changes

PAR.Name: Type
PAR.Comment: All members of the household belong to one unit

PAR.Name: Members
PAR.Comment: Specify members of the family unit

PAR.Name: Type
PAR.Comment: Each member of the household forms own unit

PAR.Name: Type
PAR.Comment: Unit members are defined by parameter Members

PAR.Name: PartnerCond
PAR.Comment: Default = head: idperson=idpartner i.e., one's own partner id is the same as the head's id

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Be eligible to Juntos and be poor by the poverty index

PAR.Name: $bot01
PAR.Comment: Transfer Bono me quedo en casa - amount

PAR.Name: $bsaoa
PAR.Comment: Social Assistance for old age - amount

PAR.Name: $bsa
PAR.Comment: Social Assistance conditional cash transfer - amount

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Age>=65, be poor by the poverty index, not have health insurance and not be affiliated to a pension fund

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Eligibility includes a threshold for the random number to match the number of hosueholds who received the benefit (69968 households)

PAR.Name: Elig_Cond
PAR.Comment: Receive bsa_s or bsaoa_s or be poor but earn less than 3000 soles

PAR.Name: bsa_s
PAR.Comment: BEN: Social Assistance Conditional Cash Transfer

PAR.Name: bot01_s
PAR.Comment: BEN: Bono me quedo en casa

PAR.Name: ils_dispyx
PAR.Comment: Disposable income accounting for own produce

PAR.Name: Name
PAR.Comment: Standard rated items for VAT purposes

PAR.Name: Formula
PAR.Comment: Recover the tax amount from the final expenditure under a 18% tax rate

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Disposable income higher than in base year (or the same)

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: ... increase by change in disposable income

PAR.Name: Output_Var
PAR.Comment: Assign to variable of simulated consumption

PAR.Name: Comp_Cond
PAR.Comment: Disposable income smaller than in base year

PAR.Name: Comp_perTU
PAR.Comment: ... decrease by change in disposable income

PAR.Name: $protect_cons
PAR.Comment: Constant share of own-account production consumed that is protected from the shock
